title: Rosewood Cyber Rubber Dumbbell Toy for Dogs - Tough, Chew-Resistant Interactive Dog Toy for Chewing, Fetch and Play - Non-Toxic Rubber - Supports Dental Health - Assorted Colours (1pc, Medium)
features: DURABLE, CHEW-RESISTANT DESIGN: Crafted from high quality rubber, this dumbbell is part of Rosewood’s premium range of tough toys, made to withstand vigorous chewing
DUMBBELL SHAPE FOR EASY GRIP: The easy-to-grip design makes it ideal for throwing, fetching, and tug-of-war, keeping your dog physically engaged and mentally stimulated
SUPPORTS DENTAL HEALTH: The textured surface of this toy helps to clean teeth and massage gums as your dog plays, chews and catches, supporting overall oral hygiene
NON-TOXIC RUBBER: Manufactured from pet-safe rubber that’s free from harmful chemicals - giving you peace of mind while your dog plays and chews
VIBRANT ASSORTED COLOURS: Available in a variety of eye-catching colours (randomly selected), enhancing visibility during playtime
description: Product Description This premium quality rubber dog toy is part of the ever popular Rosewood Cyber Rubber range of tough, chew resistant rubber toys, designed to encourage dogs with the options to chew, chase, catch and tug, all with the added benefit of helping to keep teeth and gums clean and healthy!. Great fun and bright colours too. Colours may vary. Directions Safety Advice: For your pets safety examine the toy from time to time for wear and replace it when appropriate. Pets should be supervised when playing with toys. It is the responsibility of the owner to decide if this toy is suitable for their pet. Choose toys based on pet size and chewing habits. Keep out of reach of children. Box Contains Rosewood Cyber Rubber dumbbell chew toy, medium, colours may vary See more
